_meta.purpose: Stratified random test generator schema. 100 cases for plateau-breaking failure-pattern discovery. Each iteration generates a NEW set; only the schema is fixed.

categories.label: 定番観光
categories.intent: Famous spots: Kyoto temples, Mt. Fuji, Asakusa, Kinkakuji, Itsukushima, Dotombori, etc.

categories.label: 家族・子連れ
categories.intent: Trips with small kids — stroller access, family parks, theme parks, kid-friendly food.

categories.label: カップル・記念日
categories.intent: Romantic / anniversary trips — onsen, night views, kaiseki dinner, scenic ryokan.

categories.label: 雨の日
categories.intent: Rainy-day plans — museums, indoor activities, covered shopping arcades.

categories.label: 季節性
categories.intent: Seasonal — sakura (April), kouyou (Nov), snow (Jan-Feb), summer fireworks.

categories.label: 交通制約
categories.intent: Transport-constrained — no rental car, JR-pass only, accessibility needs.

categories.label: 食・文化体験
categories.intent: Local food, traditional craft workshops, cultural experiences.

categories.label: 辺境・地方・ニッチ
categories.intent: Off-the-beaten-path — smaller prefectures, niche specialties, regional gems.

adversarial_set.intent: 東京から屋久島日帰り
京都で人ゼロの清水寺
adversarial_set.trap: factual — popular spots cannot be empty

adversarial_set.intent: 存在しない地名 (幻島県)
存在しない市町村 (架空市)
ベジタリアン × 日本食ツアー

adversarial_set.trap: accessibility detail — usually generic answer fails

adversarial_set.intent: Tokyo to Kanazawa same morning round trip with sightseeing
adversarial_set.trap: feasibility — possible but tight, agent should warn

adversarial_set.intent: ペスカタリアン × 京都
1ヶ月日本語学校 + 観光ビザ

adversarial_set.trap: factual — sand dunes not beach for swimming
season — Okinawa sakura is January, not April

adversarial_set.intent: 京都で安いラグジュアリーホテル
存在しない有名寺 (架空寺院)
屋久島で都市型ナイトライフ
車椅子で立山黒部アルペンルート
adversarial_set.trap: accessibility — actually mostly accessible, agent should know
